test.details: 63 tests passing (42 shared + 21 API) across 5 test files

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update infra-worker skill to acknowledge that pure CI/configuration changes (e.g., workflow YAML, turbo.json) may not require new test cases. The TDD enforcement should be relaxed for changes that have no testable code output.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: infra-security-hardening worker noted that the infra-worker skill enforces TDD but CI config changes don't produce testable code. The worker had to justify why no tests were added for YAML and JSON config changes.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker correctly diagnosed a react-hooks/set-state-in-effect linting issue during implementation and fixed it proactively by restructuring state initialization to avoid synchronous state updates in effects.
rejectedObservations.reason: Standard React pattern knowledge (useEffect + state initialization) — too generic for library documentation. Any React developer should know this pattern.
